definition.title: Jeff's 5-Min Driver Address (YouTube Authority Asset)
definition.objective: Founder voice asset and caption goldmine. Scripted positioning mined for months of content. Evergreen founder authority content. Potential series: Founder Fridays, From Jeff's Desk, Why We Built This.
definition.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary), prospective LHS members, LinkedIn professionals, general social followers
definition.cadence: Evergreen. Once per month minimum. Use when driver engagement dips or around membership pushes.

campaign_card.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary), prospective LHS members, LinkedIn professionals, general social followers
key_messages: Founder-to-driver trust content that builds legitimacy and relatability
Underutilized asset — single video generates months of micro content
Voice capture: extract key phrases, recurring metaphors, emotional high points

initiatives: Micro video clips (20-45 second hooks). LinkedIn thought posts from transcript. Quote graphics. Carousel series. Recurring series (Founder F

_legacy_card.description: Direct communication from Jeff Swenson to truck drivers. Clear articulation of LHS intent, emotional positioning, industry empathy, and cultural tone. Human, spoken, personal, authentic.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Founder voice asset and caption goldmine. Scripted positioning mined for months of content. Evergreen founder authority content. Potential series: Founder Fridays, From Jeff's Desk, Why We Built This.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Direct-to-driver emotional trust. Founder authenticity. Industry empathy. Problem-solution framing for relay concept.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Micro video clips (20-45 second hooks). LinkedIn thought posts from transcript. Quote graphics. Carousel series. Recurring series (Founder Fridays).
_legacy_card.timeline: Evergreen. Once per month minimum. Use when driver engagement dips or around membership pushes.
